entities.name: CHICKPEA
entities.description: The legume species Cicer arietinum L.

entities.name: CHIKPGRO
entities.description: A growth and development model developed for chickpea.

entities.name: GROUNDNUT
entities.description: The legume species used as a basis for the PNUTGRO model.

entities.name: PNUTGRO
entities.description: A growth model for groundnut used as the basis for CHIKPGRO.

entities.name: VEGETATIVE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The growth phase of the plant before reproduction.

entities.name: REPRODUCTIVE DEVELOPMENT
entities.description: The growth phase involving flowering and seed production.

entities.name: CROP GROWTH
entities.description: The overall increase in plant biomass and size.

entities.name: ASSIMILATE PARTITIONING
entities.description: The distribution of photosynthates to various plant organs.

entities.name: WATER-LIMITING CONDITIONS
entities.description: Situations where water availability restricts plant growth.

entities.name: NON-LIMITING CONDITIONS
entities.description: Situations where water is sufficient for plant growth.

entities.name: ANNIGERI
entities.description: A specific cultivar of chickpea.

entities.name: JG 74
entities.description: A specific cultivar of chickpea.

entities.name: SOIL WATER BALANCE
entities.description: The movement and storage of water in the root-zone soil.

entities.name: FLOWERING
entities.description: The stage of plant development when flowers open.

entities.name: POD INITIATION
entities.description: The stage when pods begin to form.

entities.name: SEED GROWTH
entities.description: The process of seed development and enlargement.

entities.name: PHYSIOLOGICAL MATURITY
entities.description: The stage when the seed has reached its maximum dry weight.

entities.name: EXTREME WET CONDITIONS
entities.description: Situations with excessive water availability.

entities.name: LEAF AREA INDEX
entities.description: The ratio of total upper leaf surface of a crop to the surface area of the land on which the crop grows.

entities.name: TOTAL DRY MATTER PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total biomass accumulated by the plant.

entities.name: IRRIGATED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Situations where water is artificially supplied to the crop.

entities.name: WATER-STRESSED CONDITIONS
entities.description: Situations where the plant lacks sufficient water.

entities.name: SOIL MOISTURE
entities.description: The amount of water held in the soil.

entities.name: SEED YIELD
entities.description: The amount of seed produced per unit area.

entities.name: INDIAN PLATEAU
entities.description: The geographical region where the model is applicable.
